Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JENNIFER JEW'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO REQUIRE CLAIMANT TO PROVIDE UNDERTAKING AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES.
APPEARANCES: JAMES C. DRISCOLL, ESQUIRE (415.673.6000) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DONALD MAH, ESQUIRE (650.755.8601) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: MR. MAH PROVIDES THE COURT WITH DOCUMENTS SHOWING THAT HE HAS SUBSTITUED IN AS COUNSEL AND A STIPULATION CLARIFYING THE TENANCY QUESTION. APPEARANCES: JAMES C. DRISCOLL, ESQUIRE (415.673.6000) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DONALD MAH, ESQUIRE (650.755.8601) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERS. MR. MAH IS TO FILE A NOTICE OF APPEARANCE BY SEPTEMBER 6, 2007. COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT MR.
